---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "Notebooks, signals, and the occasional explainer."
listing:
  id: all-posts
  contents: "."
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  filter-ui: [title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  categories: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {#all-posts}
:::
